name: harness
description: Reusable Codex harness for workflow-oriented project task control and adapter-driven execution. / 可复用 Codex 项目任务控制与 adapter 执行工作流。

interface.shortDescription: Orient, intake, initialize, and execute adapter-driven project work. / 定位、收集、初始化并执行 adapter 驱动的项目工作。
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness provides reusable Codex workflow protocols for fixed-contract and adapter-contract projects: orientation, idea intake, project adapters, configurable artifact paths, goal handoffs, run packets, gates, evidence, and worktree policy guidance. zh-CN fallback: Agent Harness 为 fixed / adapter contract 项目提供可复用 Codex 工作流协议，覆盖只读定位、需求收集、项目 adapter、可配置 artifact paths、goal handoff、run packet、gate、evidence 和 worktree policy guidance。
interface.defaultPrompt: Use harness:orient to inspect this project, resolve its harness contract and adapter paths, then recommend the next confirmed workflow.
